gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/434)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/434)
text: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ إِذَا اشْتَكَى رَأْسَهُ اسْتَعَطَ بِدُهْنِ الْجُلْجُلَانِ وَ هُوَ السِّمْسِمُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from someone else, from Al Khashaab, from Giyas Bin Kulyeb, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws that whenever Rasool-Allahsaww complained of his head (ache), would sniff the Al-Juljulaan oil, and it is the sesame’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from more than one person from al-Khashshab from Ghiyath ibn Kalub from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, complained about his head he inhaled sesame oil.”’
